must_detect.matched_text:
To: Risk and Disclosure Committee; From: Ms. Tran Thi Mai, Compliance Officer; contact: privacy@lotusinfratech.vn; date: 30 May 2026
Under the Securities Law (VN), MNPI means issuer/securities information not yet public with significant price impact; our draft Q2 revenue guidance and Project “Mangrove” term sheet remain MNPI until filing with the domestic stock exchange.
Insider list updated on 18 May; the trading blackout for covered staff concluded on 24 May 2026 (control completed, no open action).
DPA Schedule 2 with SericaPay Pte Ltd (SG) for payroll subprocessing limits fields to hashed work emails and internal employee codes; cross-border transfer approved by Data Export Approval CBT-2026-17 on 15 May and executed 16 May 2026.
Employee Onboarding Form VN-EMP-2026 revised for data minimisation per Decree 13/2023/ND-CP; personal email and phone are no longer mandatory and birth-place collection has been removed.
On 21 May 2026 we received a consent withdrawal and DSAR from Mr. Phan Duc Long (ex-contractor) regarding marketing uses; acknowledgement sent within 72 hours and identity verified via ticket PRV-1180.
On 24 May 2026 his CRM profile, ad-tech tags, and mailing list entries were erased and a suppression flag applied; erasure report filed under PRV-1182.
Finance Policy FIN-R-09 sets retention of bank reconciliation logs at 90 days; the scheduled purge completed on 28 May 2026 and no exceptions were logged.
The proposed export of customer KYC images to Amber Analytics Co., Ltd. (VN) for a sandbox test was rejected by the DPO on 10 May; no images were transferred and the request is closed.
Treasury settlements via Truyen Tin Commercial Bank use masked beneficiary references only; national ID numbers are not collected or stored in our payment module.
In the pre-clearance call with the VN capital markets regulator regarding our disclosure timetable, we confirmed MNPI will not be shared with any third party other than external counsel until public release.
